assertions.description: Board has 44 switches routed via PCA9506BS I2C I/O expanders (not a direct row/col net pattern), so key_matrices=[] is understandable — but worth noting. Separately, 'Antenna_Dipole' (ref AE1) is typed as 'ic' instead of 'connector' or 'other'. The addressable LED chain (31x SK6812) is correctly detected.
